title: Agentic commerce
content: Stablecoins and blockchains are the missing piece of agentic commerce: an immutable, always-on, transactional database with a decentralized virtual machine.

title: Gold-backed stablecoins
content: Tether exec: there's a scenario where we go back to a gold-pegged economy in which case gold-backed stablecoins are the future of financial rails.
Be guided by beauty. — Jim Simons
